summary: Implement complete map candidate pipeline path
acceptance_criteria: A complete Alpha map candidate path exists from validated source data through deterministic compiled map payloads to map-renderer-compatible read models.
Map candidate IDs, district references, route references, water/land classifications, and rendering order are stable and explicitly schema-validated.
Map renderer changes remain presentational and do not become authoritative state, hidden simulation input, or React-managed per-entity Pixi object ownership.
The task does not final-lock exact borders, production art style, formal cultural symbols, complex naval warfare, 3D battle, manual node battle, or release map content.
required_tests: Map candidate tests cover deterministic ordering, bad references, route/water classification, renderer read-model shape, and no sim-core authority import.
notes: This is a candidate pipeline path, not final M7 map/content lock.
Historical uncertainty must remain visible through source labels and review notes.
Do not add map-derived simulation authority outside explicit content/runtime boundaries.
